questions.question: This game show sees a male contestant eliminate guests until the series finale, where he's expected to choose a wife from among them!
What performer released the 2018 single 'Mia' with Drake?
Set 97 years after Earth was destroyed, this series follows 100 juvenile delinquents who are sent back to repopulate the planet.
Which rapper tried to file a US patent for the term 'okurrr'?
Starring Troian Bellisario and Lucy Hale, this mystery series follows 4 teens whose friendship falls apart after their leader disappears.
